Anyone who is eligible to vote and registered as a Democrat can file to become Tom's delegate! I'll be honest, being a delegate is a commitment. But it's also a great experience -- it's a rare opportunity to participate in our democracy in a unique way. Plus, we've got your back to support you through the process. Pennsylvania's delegate deadline is coming up quickly. [_**Sign up today to take the first step in becoming Tom 's delegate.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BWp8mgLBf1fism106TNCZPfkSD4mqiiyxQM0i0UF2RwxQ4hknyLMkhBs58rYP79Wv3atlv2xO0b3dV5h96Q2ALBv18rDRpSt8UgwrfD2zX4QWd-2Fdf0q5zMi8rd6xEuNtVGvCFJj3rYbxPfquErMPCHRR-2BDm6JBlSI18lWGScOFPit9eIUEQujMeguKLlE2tgKw-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFe-2FxCYi6-2BOIRhJGpZ1qS5b-2B6-2FX6m1I-2FIC5GkhHAnRYPYpQjhm8xh05a48cRT2oGUyDXCCVPgMHXX60tgEu2A-2FRGJFriHu4eJ3SOsgocBzFD1nXTXddpDN1Ka2-2B1Sf69EqnCQ15Lz-2FaKORsTL-2FqcO-2BKHqzLAriIQzQIBkSMz-2BbRCufkNEzeYsANtrHUYAD9QJKRlvKsN7tgl92aopVG4pz8-2Bhtrzb-2BC6UO8JFaXXAr7HkRyyX0Fo79rPdg-2FSy2-2BoybQw69XC0mt40SfXq01nQKqKClSzgT6edKvpFy830N-2BrpN5c8M1EdAxhHqiLtxPiswzWrDuIHfbWjWSmWxUF59ya82hWA0nSY8-2FRKVW-2B0MbgaQ-3D-3D) Thanks!

body:
| **BREAKING: Mike Pompeo is not running for Kansas' Senate Seat.** **In 2018:** Kansas elected a Democratic governor for the first time since 2006 when Laura Kelly defeated Kris Kobach.

**This Year:** Kansas has an open Senate seat, **_and polling shows that Democrats have a lead on Republican front runner Kris Kobach (who 's running AGAIN despite losing in 2018)._**

**Now:** With Mike Pompeo out of the race for Senate the New York Times says that Pompeo's decision "_ends Republicans ' hopes of securing a potentially dominant candidate for the open seat in Kansas, his home state._"

**[Chip in $10 now to help flip a Senate seat in Kansas>>](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-janfr?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+ask+now+to+help+flip+a+Senate+se&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30DO30DNTL_200106_2_1&source=314_EM_FR_30DO30DNTL_200106_2_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30DO30DNTL_200106_2_1")** | | [Chip in Now](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-janfr?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+Now&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30DO30DNTL_200106_2_1&source=314_EM_FR_30DO30DNTL_200106_2_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30DO30DNTL_200106_2_1")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Guest?=
subject: 2020 Re-Election Campaign Launched!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2f06d8f667d5/2020-re-election-campaign-launched?e=6645c92bcf)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | _**2020 Re-Election Campaign Launches Today!**_

---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=034bc3c65b&e=6645c92bcf "CONTRIBUTE")
---
|
---
| _Today, I filed qualifying papers to run for re-election and launched my campaign—and I hope you’ll join me!_

Haley and I are very grateful for all of your support in the past, and as we enter this 2020 campaign, we would be honored to have your continued [support](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=f3dea0c764&e=6645c92bcf).
_I'm running on my record of representing our conservative values and getting things done to make Mississippi an even better place to live, work, worship, and raise a family._

When I was elected to Congress in 2018, I made a commitment to the people of Mississippi that I would fight for our conservative values and work hard to get things done for our state.

I’m asking for everyone’s vote based on _my record of supporting free market economic policies of lower taxes and fewer regulations, and promoting our Constitutional freedoms and liberties including the right to life and our 2nd Amendment rights._

I’ve worked to strengthen our agricultural community, and fought for _stronger border security_ and other measures to _secure our nation from illegal immigration, drugs, and terrorist threats._ I’ve worked to prevent violence against our faith-based institutions and wholeheartedly supported our troops and law enforcement officers.

Serving on the House Committee on Homeland Security, the House Foreign Affairs Committee, and the House Committee on Ethics has given me the opportunity to fight for Mississippi’s interests and our conservative values.

I hope you’ll join our campaign today, and if you can make a [donation](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=f40336eae6&e=6645c92bcf) to help ensure we’re prepared to run a strong, robust campaign, I would greatly appreciate your help.

I’ve been active in many legislative efforts during my first term and I was the _first Republican freshman member of Congress to write legislation that was passed by the entire U.S. House of Representatives, and the second Republican freshman to author a bill that was signed into law._

This legislation, H.R. 1590, titled _“The Terrorist and Foreign Fighter Travel Exercise Act,” was signed into law by President Donald Trump._ This bill supports President Trump’s National Strategy to Combat Terrorist Travel, and I expect that future law enforcement agents who are charged with protecting our nation from foreign threats will be better equipped, trained, and prepared to prevent and respond to terrorist activity in our country.

I’ve also used my experience as a former District Attorney to defend President Donald Trump against the partisan impeachment process. _I voted against the Articles of Impeachment and cosponsored legislation to censure Congressman Adam Schiff_ for misleading the American public and providing false statements on his interactions with the whistleblower.

I need your [help](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=a264f8475e&e=6645c92bcf) today so we’re fully prepared to win and to make sure our conservative values are represented in Congress—and to **_help Republicans regain control of the House of Representatives_**. Thank you!

Sincerely,
---
|
---
|
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=e05de3bff9&e=6645c92bcf "CONTRIBUTE")

name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: January Issues Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
| | Folks, this is your last chance to let John know what your top issues are before we close the survey and send him the results. It should only take a few minutes (two, tops!) to complete. **[Click here to take our survey and let John know what issues matter to you most in this race.](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771540/691c9bd/6f56157e/11a733bb/1749173762/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/january-issues-survey-0106")** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771540/691c9bd/6f56157e/11a733bb/1749173762/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/january-issues-survey-0106")
---
Thanks for taking the time, folks. It's incredibly important to John that he gets your feedback on the most pressing issues we're facing right now.
-- Team Hick
_\---------- Forwarded message from John Hickenlooper ----------_
Folks,
Now that 2020 is in full swing, I want to take a moment and check in with you about your priorities for this election.
Traveling the state, I hear so many reasons why Coloradans want new leadership in Washington right now.
Republicans are trying to sabotage our health care. Climate change is threatening our future. Plus, more than 200 Republican lawmakers just asked the Supreme Court to reconsider _Roe v. Wade_ and abortion rights. The list goes on and on, but we have a chance this year to win this election, flip the Senate, and make real progress on these important issues.
Based on his voting record, it's clear my incumbent Republican opponent is more concerned with pleasing the special interests backing his campaign than listening to Coloradans about what truly matters to them.
Now more than ever, we must come together to build a winning movement to take back Colorado and give people a leader they can put their trust in to do right by them. But the only way we'll win is if we set our priorities and follow through on them together.
[**That 's why I'm hoping you'll take a moment to let me know what's on your mind and what issues matter most to you in this race. Click here to take my one-minute priorities survey now:**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771540/691c9bd/6f56157e/11a733bb/1749173762/VEsF/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/january-issues-survey-0106")
[TAKE SURVEY](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771540/691c9bd/6f56157e/11a733bb/1749173762/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/january-issues-survey-0106")
---
From the start, I've built my public service on listening as much as I talk. This campaign is about you, folks. That's why your input matters so much today.
Thanks. I'll be in touch.
-- John

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---
P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
[Unsubscribe here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771540/691c9bd/6f56157e/11a733b8/1749173762/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump: ‘My highest and most solemn duty’
body:
Four days ago, the United States military executed a flawless precision strike that killed the worst remaining terrorist on Earth, Qasem Soleimani. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=903da9bce5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 6, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump: ‘My highest and most solemn duty’**

**Four days ago,** the United States military executed a flawless precision strike that killed the worst remaining terrorist on Earth, Qasem Soleimani. The next day, President Donald J. Trump delivered a statement on the successful operation.

**“As President,** my highest and most solemn duty is the defense of our nation and its citizens,” he said. “Soleimani was plotting imminent and sinister attacks on American diplomats and military personnel, but we caught him in the act and terminated him.”

**President Trump:** [We will always protect Americans and our allies](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8620877b23&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Under my leadership,** America’s policy is unambiguous: To terrorists who harm or intend to harm any American, we will find you. We will eliminate you.”

**Led by Soleimani,** the ruthless Quds Force of Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps facilitated horrific acts of terrorism. Soleimani himself contributed to plots as far-flung as New Delhi and London—and even the United States. In 2011, he organized an attempted assassination of the Saudi ambassador to America in Washington, D.C.

**During the Iraq War** , Soleimani’s camps trained killers that were directly responsible for the deaths of 603 American service members. Thousands more were wounded.

**In the past few weeks** alone, attacks on U.S. targets in Iraq included rocket strikes that killed an American and badly injured four U.S. servicemen, as well as a violent assault on the U.S. Embassy in Baghdad. All were carried out at Soleimani’s direction.

**Americans are safer today** because the world’s worst terrorist is dead. The Iranian people are safer, too: Soleimani recently led the brutal repression of protestors in his own country. In the end, more than 1,000 innocent civilians were tortured and killed by their government in Tehran. Soleimani’s disrespect for life knew no borders or limits.

**These grave facts** aren’t in dispute. Every American who believes in the dignity of human life should rejoice at our military’s tremendous success last week. Partisan politics sometimes gets in the way of uniting around good news, however—certain career politicians are too worried about who will get the credit.

**Real experts** across the political spectrum are setting the record straight. Former Sen. Joe Lieberman, the 2000 Democratic candidate for Vice President, said “President Trump’s order to take out Qasem Soleimani was morally, constitutionally and strategically correct. [It deserves more bipartisan support](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e9c4dcb40&e=3ee4985eea) than the begrudging or negative reactions it has received thus far from my fellow Democrats.”

**President Obama’s** former Homeland Security Secretary Jeh Johnson also shot down claims from some Democrats that the Soleimani operation could be unlawful. Based on the rationale presented by our military, “the President, under his constitutional authority as Commander in Chief, had ample domestic legal authority to take him out without an additional congressional authorization,” Johnson said.

**Secretary of State Mike Pompeo** explained President Trump’s position in a series of television interviews yesterday. “The Iranian leadership needs to understand that attacking Americans is not cost-free,” he said. “Terrorism will not benefit them.”

**In other words** , the expectations are clear. There will be no appeasement. There will be no blank checks from this Administration. America has zero interest in war. But Iran must end the one it started—now.

**🎬** [Watch President Trump’s full statement on Iran.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b191ae3293&e=3ee4985eea)

**CNN in 2016** : [Former Secretary of State John Kerry admits that some Iran Deal money would likely go to terrorism](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3660840d73&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Trump delivers remarks following the U.S. airstrike in Iraq that resulted in the death of Qassim Soleimani** | January 3, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e5131f3222&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d744f9a47&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a546e4f9cb)

In the end, more than 1,000 innocent civilians were tortured and killed by their government in Tehran. Soleimani’s disrespect for life knew no borders or limits. These grave facts aren’t in dispute. Every American who believes in the dignity of human life should rejoice at our military’s tremendous success last week. Partisan politics sometimes gets in the way of uniting around good news, however—certain career politicians are too worried about who will get the credit. Real experts across the political spectrum are setting the record straight. Former Sen. Joe Lieberman, the 2000 Democratic candidate for Vice President, said “President Trump’s order to take out Qasem Soleimani was morally, constitutionally and strategically correct. than the begrudging or negative reactions it has received thus far from my fellow Democrats.” President Obama’s former Homeland Security Secretary Jeh Johnson also shot down claims from some Democrats that the Soleimani operation could be unlawful. Based on the rationale presented by our military, “the President, under his constitutional authority as Commander in Chief, had ample domestic legal authority to take him out without an additional congressional authorization,” Johnson said. Secretary of State Mike Pompeo explained President Trump’s position in a series of television interviews yesterday. “The Iranian leadership needs to understand that attacking Americans is not cost-free,” he said. “Terrorism will not benefit them.” In other words , the expectations are clear. There will be no appeasement. There will be no blank checks from this Administration. America has zero interest in war. But Iran must end the one it started—now. 🎬 CNN in 2016 : | | Photo of the Day | Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead | President Trump delivers remarks following the U.S. airstrike in Iraq that resulted in the death of Qassim Soleimani | January 3, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: BREAKING NEWS
subject: Pompeo is OUT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| **BREAKING: Mike Pompeo is not running for Kansas' Senate Seat.** **In 2018:** Kansas elected a Democratic governor for the first time since 2006 when Laura Kelly defeated Kris Kobach.

**This Year:** Kansas has an open Senate seat, **_and polling shows that Democrats have a lead on Republican front runner Kris Kobach (who 's running AGAIN despite losing in 2018)._**

**Now:** With Mike Pompeo out of the race for Senate the New York Times says that Pompeo's decision "_ends Republicans ' hopes of securing a potentially dominant candidate for the open seat in Kansas, his home state._"

For the first time since 1932, we have a real shot at flipping a Senate seat in Kansas.

She understands the importance of affordable healthcare and will not hesitate to take action on our climate crisis.

**But Dr. Bollier needs your help.**

Thank you for helping us flip the Senate,

314 Action

name: Peter Khalil
subject: "Please don't speak Farsi..."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peter Khalil
body:
| | | | We are approaching an international crisis.
---
---
**—**
“My daughter was telling me, ‘Please don’t speak Farsi. Maybe if you don’t speak Farsi they won’t take you.' This is not OK.”
As a first-generation American and the son of Middle Eastern immigrants, I am appalled by the recent revelation that Americans of Iranian descent are being profiled and detained at our border crossings.
In the wake of escalating tensions with Iran, we stand on the precipice of an international crisis with domestic implications. This is a crisis borne of impulsive and uninformed governance.
It doesn't have to be this way.
In 2020, we can elect people to government who believe in deliberation, diplomacy, and dedication to American institutions.
Every day, I talk to people in Washington's 3rd District who are relying on me to fight for reforms we desperately need. We must transform of our immigration, healthcare, and criminal justice systems. And we must restore the era of deliberative government.
We can't do any of these things without you. Raising money for a progressive campaign is notoriously difficult. We don't have hordes of corporate executives or piles of PAC money coming our way.
Every quarter of 2020 is critical for this campaign's survival. There are over 7,000 of you on this list, which means that just a [$5 sustaining monthly contribution ](https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=W9Smq9u-2FGdEKDZ-2FVYToYN6pl0-2FWBthAfFjKtIUkeW8ja6P0pE-2BHZzPxW9-2FjzG-2BPHkAtOJ3eORenM7dcA5JGIAcI2j9XeuQNnqgyj2wyp5SWUat0dl3dlyS3nVI4ybejM_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCERHvyJx0KbFNmY2J7ZEKFKefcffNXOVKWpqwejHvWn1-2F3qFhsV-2FmaEkQjQPr-2FMffelBPPeLb2a-2BQnbGML-2Be3VxGP-2BHf3E6-2Fh0cLUV3MGQVxx187-2FhCg2NkR7xNHZR-2BK219fjThNhlBaTIrfKgDgZ1-2Bm9JAkFgn8VstZzI96EqOFhWbwPFkQnwcNKVHJroWimIdv9FI7HDdMBmSpfk38L0qWPFz-2BJftj3KfxujfnSs9q9PwOysLeNPVvR6uV9EF1YvZxeXAbwFsbWb5Y-2F5pk-2BiLWUhOGMij1Tv06KRDC-2FcHRz2vuYzVu-2FUUDCaGb54WJrU4K-2Bxo-2FMPo21xf89l0P1tMUyU8BqyP5EDDhddfi17YXVKuB0F3Syao2A4EwwyUTRKMwoYLNxRZt-2FAQvc4BBwWj3P6xT-2B3fbGPvD-2FuZ6VcBPdwNP0veQt6Y8NGkYwh74pi0LiEqyqgCtLzjR9y0WgroJC9fJNSLbMfem4P-2B0M7lCQIbSdnFbbvlNN30TGHjimgpF-2BpY3n21SGpRLQ1qmE-2FGGDkGdP2SnGoK-2BYG5qpCjB1Vq45rBWO6Y4PKKzPMQgv-2FcsRTHEg-2Fnaj0FKUojDmnr1h-2FT8ZN-2FmKHknWY-2BPa9CKQ-3D-3D)from each of you would provide us with $35,000 of monthly income to keep us in front of the people who matter most: our 750,000 constituents.

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: I will not be the first, nor will I be the last to tell you this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
The most important race happening is for control of the Senate.
| | |
---
I will not be the first, nor will I be the last to tell you this, friends: **The most important race happening is for control of the Senate.**
I have a front-row seat to the damage Mitch McConnell is causing in the Senate. He is blocking every last attempt at progress that our Democratic colleagues in the House are fighting so hard for - environmental protections, gun safety measures, affordable healthcare. **If a Democrat wins the White House, they MUST have the Senate as well. **
That's why I'm reaching out to you about Gary Peters' race in Michigan. Experts from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call say Democrats can win back the Senate - **_but only if Gary wins in Michigan. _**
The thing is that Gary's reelection won't be easy. He's one of two Democratic Senate candidates fighting to win in a state President Trump carried. To top it all off, Gary is winning by just one point - 44% to 43% - over his hard-right opponent, handpicked by Trump and McConnell.
**So here's the deal: I told Gary I'd help him raise $7,300 to protect Michigan's Democratic Senate seat, and we really need to hit that goal before midnight. Can I count on you to give now and help us take back the Senate majority? **
**[Please, click here to give $5 or more to help Gary Peters keep Michigan blue, defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da955/5721a3ed/7044b510/efb4873/1109200397/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyMzgtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk238-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

clean_body: The most important race happening is for control of the Senate. | | | I will not be the first, nor will I be the last to tell you this, friends: The most important race happening is for control of the Senate. I have a front-row seat to the damage Mitch McConnell is causing in the Senate. He is blocking every last attempt at progress that our Democratic colleagues in the House are fighting so hard for - environmental protections, gun safety measures, affordable healthcare. If a Democrat wins the White House, they MUST have the Senate as well. That's why I'm reaching out to you about Gary Peters' race in Michigan. Experts from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call say Democrats can win back the Senate - but only if Gary wins in Michigan. The thing is that Gary's reelection won't be easy. He's one of two Democratic Senate candidates fighting to win in a state President Trump carried. To top it all off, Gary is winning by just one point - 44% to 43% - over his hard-right opponent, handpicked by Trump and McConnell. So here's the deal: I told Gary I'd help him raise $7,300 to protect Michigan's Democratic Senate seat, and we really need to hit that goal before midnight. Can I count on you to give now and help us take back the Senate majority? "" "" "" "" "" The path to taking back the Senate for Democrats is a tough one. But it runs straight through Michigan, and that's why we need to make supporting Gary a priority. I appreciate you stepping up and being a part of this fight. Chuck | "" PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan Po Box 32072 Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. body:
Send us an email to request your yard sign today

Friend,

It's official, our new Hunt for Congress yard signs have arrived! We need your help to get Wesley's name and message out today.

Reply to this email to sign up to get your yard sign delivered.

Lizzie Fletcher promised to be a moderate, but has backed Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time and refused to stand up for Houston and our way of life. But if we're going to beat her in November 2020, we need to start now.

**By just replying to this email with your name and address, you can help us get one step closer to electing Wesley and flipping the 7th District!**

Thanks for all of your continued help and support!

Best,

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: wealth tax
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
**_“One of the primary roots of wealth inequality: the richest Americans get to live by a different set of rules than everyone else.”_ — Tom Steyer, op-ed in _USA Today_ on October 2018**

---
We need a wealth tax, friend. For too long, the gains in our economy have been going to the wealthy while American workers have been left out in the rain. CEO compensation has grown 940% since 1978, while wages for the average American worker have only increased by 12%. Tom knows that we cannot claim prosperity as a nation unless we _all_ prosper together. And that’s why he called for a wealth tax — even before Elizabeth Warren did. **Add your name so Tom knows you support a wealth tax.**
---
| [Add name](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU1BPTVmlzZUUuFOp7lM1akxPTP45d8OFL7kNkzJTpTlTSkUz4wfpTc4yeigOYwGexJ-2FsACXzQi-2B2Lrc45NLaA8zzEdpRX6bkkFMQFpv4DgFESoWIycbQwIuc8FZpDFzQbEO-2B6DciGt2InBixst5YY9GNi4ltUddhEIFd9DMqVVmNiqbSgrcXEdAL2q283a1ww-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFdA14I9kGoxlPKbYHkyWtLfAUXed0zxXmtH95K3p7CQUrwaPgtd8Jm3YoQHSSb8Q1JFEWOshat5f1T-2ByjBYvrijTRsZ7VeIqOLT65JR3p2PMElbhhLhjO8ULNcQAOuBkcp0G95NoRXFDAeJZBXPW-2FQudJd9Ac5gb3cYL-2FIo3r6DWbFXIEb72KMyHiPD90KfmKK5GaXZPX6-2B78IDyQxDol0Ywjd1BHlPYSv11gZcwkV-2F8PT24K1RaSUSUixuCEOlZq3n2j45Cg-2F-2BqEw3eOcCgZNLw-2BzYjeJT34-2FHzhmw9pHs5WnN74wGdkTjzZEzNfWQnHbwM9xjpFh59Hlkgu3S9mmQC6BM2bMioVNmMjaRwbDtwg-3D-3D)
---
Tom's plan will begin taxing wealth at $32 million, which will generate $1.7 trillion in the first 10 years. Some of that money will be used immediately to provide substantial tax cuts to the people who need them -- not the wealthy -- and there will be enough left over to help replenish Social Security, repair roads and bridges, and alleviate student loan debt. [_**If you agree with Tom 's wealth tax, add your name.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU1BPTVmlzZUUuFOp7lM1akxPTP45d8OFL7kNkzJTpTlTSkUz4wfpTc4yeigOYwGexJ-2FsACXzQi-2B2Lrc45NLaA8zzEdpRX6bkkFMQFpv4DgFESoWIycbQwIuc8FZpDFzQbEO-2B6DciGt2InBixst5YY9GNi4ltUddhEIFd9DMqVVmNiqbSgrcXEdAL2q283a1ww-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFdA14I9kGoxlPKbYHkyWtLfAUXed0zxXmtH95K3p7CQUrwaPgtd8Jm3YoQHSSb8Q1JFEWOshat5f1T-2ByjBYvrijTRsZ7VeIqOLT65JR3p2PMElbhhLhjO8ULNcQAOuBkcqxAWh6TG51peUh6aGxGF3LkhXuvBOQEwQ58HnX08BJjpowwORdy2NA2ZmMI-2BF8SqTKQExMKRy2ftDpBejRmZt6g0x2VZE3hPeBLuyG2tkqy0uSKXWaX2XPwxTt4V5LGE-2F-2BjKZgi9W7hI7Tlj-2BQyg0OnrlH3drVQX9OM06OI1U7YXgWLmy8Mr76G-2BQaBGJbmYrYo0-2B7FuhfcVuY2I77X-2B8UhOlKWmDyh97OVc8-2Fe08H0g-3D-3D) Together,

clean_body: | | | | “One of the primary roots of wealth inequality: the richest Americans get to live by a different set of rules than everyone else.” — Tom Steyer, op-ed in USA Today on October 2018 We need a wealth tax, friend. For too long, the gains in our economy have been going to the wealthy while American workers have been left out in the rain. CEO compensation has grown 940% since 1978, while wages for the average American worker have only increased by 12%. Tom knows that we cannot claim prosperity as a nation unless we all prosper together. And that’s why he called for a wealth tax — even before Elizabeth Warren did. Add your name so Tom knows you support a wealth tax. | Tom's plan will begin taxing wealth at $32 million, which will generate $1.7 trillion in the first 10 years. Some of that money will be used immediately to provide substantial tax cuts to the people who need them -- not the wealthy -- and there will be enough left over to help replenish Social Security, repair roads and bridges, and alleviate student loan debt. Together, Tom 2020 | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Julián Castro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, Julian Castro is a powerfully important voice for our country. As a presidential candidate, he proposed bold and progressive policies -- including reforming our immigration laws, fixing our broken criminal justice system, improving access to child care, and protecting the rights and equality of people with disabilities. He's made the Democratic primary more substantive, and his vision was always clear: Lift up the voices of the people who are struggling the most, and fight for deep, systemic reform. **I 'm deeply grateful to receive his endorsement today. It is an honor to fight side by side with Julian Castro for the big, structural change we need. ** **And I 'd be honored if you'd join our fight, too. Together, we can continue to lift up the voices of people who are too often unheard. We can dream big, fight hard, and win -- but only if we link arms and fight shoulder to shoulder.** _[Will you add your name to join our grassroots movement alongside Julian?](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97d/3eb3e2fc/6a0dbd60/744ea0f3/2452466374/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-join-julian-and-elizabeth-em?source=20200106_em_b2_castro_ewarren&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+add+your+name+to+join+our+grass&utm_campaign=20200106_em_b2_castro_ewarren")_ Julian and I both had the honor to serve in President Obama's administration, where we had the opportunity to work on a number of issues that touch people's lives. And we both have succeeded because we got a shot at the American Dream. I grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class in Oklahoma. When I was 12 years old, my daddy had a heart attack and was out of work for a long time. We lost our family station wagon, and we were inches away from losing our home. One day, my mother pulled on her best dress, walked down the street and got her first paying job outside the home: answering the phones at Sears. That minimum wage job saved our home and it saved our family. My life had a lot of twists and turns along the way, but I went on to attend public college for $50 a semester, graduate from law school, and become a teacher, a professor, and a US Senator -- because America invested in me. Now, Julian and I are fighting side by side to ensure that families in our country today can have the same opportunity to achieve their dreams as ours did. I admired the campaign that Julian Castro ran, and I'll continue to fight for our vision of justice and opportunity -- where everyone gets the chance to succeed and thrive. I paid close attention to the big ideas he was adding to the race (I always appreciate when someone has a plan), and I was always glad to run into him on the trail, from debate stages to the Iowa Steak Fry. Tomorrow, we'll come together again and speak at an event in New York City. We'll talk about putting political and economic power in the hands of the people, where it belongs. And we'll continue to fight to make it happen -- but we can't do it alone. [_I hope to earn your support as well. Please add your name if you 're ready to join Julian and me in this fight._](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97d/3eb3e2fc/6a0dbd60/744ea0f2/2452466374/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-join-julian-and-elizabeth-em?source=20200106_em_b2_castro_ewarren&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+I+hope+to+earn+your+support+as+well+if+r&utm_campaign=20200106_em_b2_castro_ewarren") Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97d/3eb3e2fc/6a0dbd60/744ea0fe/2452466374/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=20200106_em_b2_castro_ewarren&source=20200106_em_b2_castro_ewarren"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc97d/3eb3e2fc/6a0dbd60/744ea0fd/2452466374/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20200106_em_b2_castro_ewarren&source=20200106_em_b2_castro_ewarren"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

name: Booker HQ
subject: New ad alert 📺
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| As of this morning, we got this ad up and on the air with a six-figure ad buy -- all thanks to supporters like you chipping in. This is an important step in highlighting Cory's commitment to bringing people together to ignite our spirit of common purpose. Hey team, have you seen our new ad? You can check it out **[here](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-new-ad-ia?refcode=em_fr_20200106_BHQ_20200106-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_l1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**! As of this morning, we got this ad up and on the air with a six-figure ad buy -- all thanks to supporters like you chipping in. This is an important step in highlighting Cory's commitment to bringing people together to ignite our spirit of common purpose. But here's the thing. Since we don't have the same resources as some of the other campaigns, we have to carefully prioritize our investments. **Right now, we can only afford to play this ad in the Des Moines and Cedar Rapids media markets in Iowa.** We need to expand our reach, because we don't want to leave anyone out. These are the two most populous markets in Iowa, but there are caucus-goers in other areas of the state that have yet to be introduced to Cory that we hope to get in touch with, too. That's where you come in. **Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can, today to help us increase our ad spend?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-new-ad-ia?refcode=em_fr_20200106_BHQ_20200106-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_express5_v2&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

With less than a month before the Iowa caucuses, now's the time to use every resource we have to connect with undecided voters and bring them into our movement for big, structural change.

That's why we can't afford to fall behind other campaigns during this critical period in the election. We can close the gap and carry out our full plan to win, but only with your help.

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny! 1/6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday! First I want to wish you a Happy New Year! I hope you and your family had an enjoyable and relaxing holiday. Today marks 7 months until the primary election! August 6th is right around the corner and I will be criss-crossing the state in the coming months meeting each and every one of you. I believe every Tennessean should meet their next US Senator, so be sure to come out to an event in a county near you. I hope to see you out there. Thank you for your help and support. **Media: ** Last week, my good friend Dr. Phil Roe announced he will not be seeking re-election. I have known Dr. Roe before he was elected to the US House of Representatives and he has always been a great mentor to me, and an excellent role model for this state. While I lament that I will not have the opportunity to work alongside him in Washington, I completely respect his decision. Thank you for your service to your district, to your state, and to your country Dr. Roe! Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhlutthl-uunkhiuw-y/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhlutthl-uunkhiuw-j/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhlutthl-uunkhiuw-t/)! Also be sure to tag us on any social media for your chance to be featured in our Check-Up with Dr. Manny. This week, I'll be in Shelby County with the Republican Women of Purpose, [Putnam County at Ralph's Donuts on Thursday](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhlutthl-uunkhiuw-i/) and at the [Coffee County GOP's Grand Opening](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhlutthl-uunkhiuw-d/) on Saturday. I hope to see you out there! Help me today by signing up or donating through my website, [DrMannyforSenate.com.](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhlutthl-uunkhiuw-h/) [Pick up your Dr. Manny gear today! We have t-shirts, koozies, and bumper stickers available with a donation. ](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhlutthl-uunkhiuw-k/) We have just 7 months until the primary election. I can't do this without your support. Let's roll to victory and make a bigger difference! Dr. Manny P.S. [As we kick off our 2020 campaign, would you consider chipping in? We can't do this without you, and every donation helps! ](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhlutthl-uunkhiuw-u/) [Donate](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhlutthl-uunkhiuw-o/) |

clean_body: | | ---|---|--- | Happy Monday! First I want to wish you a Happy New Year! I hope you and your family had an enjoyable and relaxing holiday. Today marks 7 months until the primary election! August 6th is right around the corner and I will be criss-crossing the state in the coming months meeting each and every one of you. I believe every Tennessean should meet their next US Senator, so be sure to come out to an event in a county near you. I hope to see you out there. Thank you for your help and support. Media: Last week, my good friend Dr. Phil Roe announced he will not be seeking re-election. I have known Dr. Roe before he was elected to the US House of Representatives and he has always been a great mentor to me, and an excellent role model for this state. While I lament that I will not have the opportunity to work alongside him in Washington, I completely respect his decision. Thank you for your service to your district, to your state, and to your country Dr. Roe! Follow us on , , and ! Also be sure to tag us on any social media for your chance to be featured in our Check-Up with Dr. Manny. This week, I'll be in Shelby County with the Republican Women of Purpose, and at the on Saturday. I hope to see you out there! Help me today by signing up or donating through my website, We have just 7 months until the primary election. I can't do this without your support. Let's roll to victory and make a bigger difference! Dr. Manny P.S. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Dr Manny for U.S. Senate | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

| The NH Democrats' taxing spree isn't over yet! [According the NH Union Leader](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzI4MTg0NTI1NTkwNjMxNTI4JmM9bThuMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDczOTA1NTgmZD1uN2k3Yjdu.Bn6IS4jVzpIZkui1Iz1oSjxk6PMIjLfPEywg8Px9e-E), NH Democrats are planning to try and push through a 4.3% sales tax on electronic devices, including cell phones and TVs. **The bill's sponsor, Rep. Skip Cleaver (D-Nashua), stated that this technology should be taxed because it, "makes us stupid as a society."** The NH Senate Republicans will __always__ stand against any attempts by the Democrats to force a sales or income tax on the state of New Hampshire! [If you agree that we need to keep NH sales tax free, please consider making a donation of $15, $25 or even $100](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzI4MTg0NTI1NTkwNjMxNTI4JmM9bThuMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDczOTA1NjAmZD1iMHE3ZjVy.4gm7i_z-7xNuTPvMbstIf9VJeAvshLPFW6LJnijW0tM) so that we can take back the majority in NH Senate this Fall!

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Nicole Malliotakis unanimously selected to be the candidate for Congress in New York’s 11th District
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=78A93A1A1123)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=78A93A1A1123)
---
| | |
---
| | **Nicole Malliotakis Endorsed by the Staten Island Republican Party**

---
| | __Malliotakis unanimously selected to be the candidate for Congress in New York’s 11th District__

---
| | On Monday evening, the Executive Committee of the Staten Island Republican Party voted unanimously to endorse Assemblywoman Nicole Malliotakis in her bid for New York's 11th Congressional District.

Malliotakis, a five term Assemblywoman and former Republican nominee for Mayor of New York City, is one of the National Republican Congressional Committee's top recruits and has received support the support of House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy, House Whip Steve Scalise and House Republican Conference Chair Liz Cheney. Roll Call has rated NY-11 as one of the most competitive House races in the country for the 2020 election cycle.

Staten Island Republican Party Chairman Brendan Lantry said, "Nicole Malliotakis is a proven leader who will stand with President Trump in securing our borders, fighting the socialist, progressive policies of House Democrats, and continuing the pro-growth policies that bring jobs to Staten Islanders. We will spend every day working to defeat Max Rose on November 3rd with Nicole Malliotakis as our nominee."

---
| | |
---
| | [ VOLUNTEER ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=78A93A1A1124)
---
| | |
---
| | Assemblywoman Nicole Malliotakis said, "I want to thank Chairman Brendan Lantry and the men and women of the Staten Island Republican Executive Committee for their endorsement and support. Nearly a year ago, I entered the race for the 11th Congressional District seat and during that time I have laid the groundwork, assembled a campaign team and raised over $1 million that will be used to defeat Congressman Max Rose."

"The past year has been a tumultuous one, especially in the halls of Congress. Sadly, Max Rose has proven he simply isn't up to the job. During his campaign and in office, Max Rose claimed that he's a moderate. But, in reality, he votes with Nancy Pelosi over 95% of the time, and he has caved to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ilhan Omar and the socialist squad."

"What's even more disturbing is the way Max flipped-flopped and joined the ranks of Reps. Jerry Nadler and Adam Schiff in voting for their dubious Articles of Impeachment."

"My New Year's resolution is to make Max Rose a one term congressman and return the 11th Congressional District to a Republican who will vote with President Trump to secure our borders, create jobs, improve healthcare, and deliver an infrastructure package that benefits our community."

---
| | |
---
| | [ GET INVOLVED ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=78A93A1A1124)
---

name: Ralph Northam
subject: The most consequential session in a generation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
Join me before midnight
|
---

---

---
| | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21ec/39260142/425f0ee6/6263969e/1772108405/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa19")
---
Friends-- Tomorrow, the General Assembly will convene in Richmond for the most consequential session in a generation. That's why, last month, I unveiled the most progressive budget in Virginia history, which includes proposals to invest in K-12 education, address housing affordability, make tuition-free community college available to low- and middle-income students who pursue jobs in high-demand fields, protect Virginia's environment, transform the Commonwealth's early childhood education system, and combat maternal and infant mortality. This budget is fiscally responsible by protecting Virginia's AAA bond rating and puts millions in the reserve fund--bringing the total of our financial reserves to $1.9 billion--a record amount. **[I hope you will join me by contributing to the Virginia Future Fund before our pre-session fundraising deadline at midnight so we can have the resources we need to secure a Democratic future.](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21ec/39260142/425f0ee6/62639699/1772108405/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa-futurefund")** With your support, we will pass a legislative agenda that will secure a brighter future for Virginians for generations to come. [**I hope you will join me today.**](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21ec/39260142/425f0ee6/62639699/1772108405/VEsF/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa-futurefund") Thank you, Governor Ralph Northam

name: Team Hunt
subject: Lizzie Fletcher Silent on Soleimani Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
7th District voters deserve to know if she agrees that killing terrorists is “provocative and disproportionate”
# Lizzie Fletcher Silent on Soleimani Action
_7th District voters deserve to know if she agrees that killing terrorists is “provocative and disproportionate”_
Today, Hunt for Congress released the following statement regarding the elimination of Iranian terrorist leader and Quds Force Commander Soleimani:

“I applaud the President of the United States for his unmistakable leadership in the face of looming Iranian attacks,” Hunt, a combat veteran, said. “Soleimani has the blood of hundreds of American soldiers on his hands as well as tens of thousands of Iraqis and Iranians. Justice has been served, and the world is a safer place as a result.”

Instead of putting partisan politics aside and supporting the elimination of one of the world’s most vicious terrorists, liberal politicians ranging from Presidential candidates to Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi have roundly criticized the action. Elizabeth Warren called the move “dangerous” and “inflammatory”. Speaker Pelosi called the move “provocative and disproportionate”. Sadly, these politicians are criticizing the killing of a violent terrorist simply because President Trump gave the order.

**Where does Rep. Lizzie Fletcher stand? **

Despite this being the most consequential piece of international news in several months, Lizzie Fletcher has once again tried to hide from her constituents. 7th district voters deserve to know whether Fletcher will support Pelosi’s attempts to hamstring future attacks on terrorists. They deserve to know whether she believes this move was “provocative and disproportionate” like Pelosi. Voters deserve to know if Lizzie Fletcher opposes this effort to protect American troops, and innocents in Iraq and Iran, for political reasons.

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=63382ba4f0964ce0b51fa1ef6035c02e&_e=lD-HKdyGI_WgWzC8ITcIh6QeDDlZs2QjtAPbP_FKtXV_l0M1MiNFkute613VcvJZ_WpIwK0XbDclB8pZRD3SYsftkJvyPfthDIc-JOjFW52iErIOdJm5txfqimpYxPtCaUPGaVRCk4kbHIXk3HxgsX87F7NK9yD-22obt_Bktzy1oKqi8dYDpfInuC0RaXezktoEaKogYiV1Nofjsg2Rc4hRB2DBy1mM2zNAlSIina6q3y_UnDnO5ti974FIjAPhDSS1akNXxSlp6FOQFTXBegJVDrC2lrafGi1Tymqjom4%3D)****

Long story short, we have a lot of bills to pay. We are reaching the critical tipping point in this campaign where what we do can win this race, or lose this race. It all depends on people like you. name: Tim Walz
subject: One Minnesota is who we are
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, Exactly one year ago, I was sworn in as Governor of Minnesota. As we start a new year, my message to you today is the same as it was when I launched my campaign and the moment I took my oath of office: There is nothing Minnesotans can't accomplish when we come together and face our challenges head-on. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/l3FMcnoaK3nAO6NLM3j7cIwel8kzF8O0CFSECDuMOjA=/rsc55DWwmgt-jhzIRZ3bck3-e4iXiIn2eoHGn7fb0to=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
My friend,
Exactly one year ago, I was sworn in as Governor of Minnesota.
As we start a new year, my message to you today is the same as it was when I launched my campaign and the moment I took my oath of office: There is nothing Minnesotans can't accomplish when we come together and face our challenges head-on.
**One Minnesota is who we are. When Minnetonka thrives, Mankato thrives. When Winona thrives, Warroad thrives.**
This past legislative session, in one of the only divided governments in the country, we proved it by passing a budget that is improving the lives of millions of Minnesotans with impactful investments in health care, education, and local communities across our state.
This is what One Minnesota is all about -- rising above the politics of fear and division and getting things done for people.
We have a lot of work ahead of us. But if you believe, as I do, that we can lead the country on education and health care, and provide an unparalleled quality of life for every Minnesotan in every zip code, I'm asking for your help.
[**On the anniversary of Inauguration Day, will you make a contribution of $5 (or whatever works today) to help us continue building a brighter future for our state?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/l3FMcnoaK3nAO6NLM3j7cIwel8kzF8O0CFSECDuMOjA=/rsc55DWwmgt-jhzIRZ3bck3-e4iXiIn2eoHGn7fb0to=?refcode=body&amount=25)

clean_body: | My friend, Exactly one year ago, I was sworn in as Governor of Minnesota. As we start a new year, my message to you today is the same as it was when I launched my campaign and the moment I took my oath of office: There is nothing Minnesotans can't accomplish when we come together and face our challenges head-on. My friend, Exactly one year ago, I was sworn in as Governor of Minnesota. As we start a new year, my message to you today is the same as it was when I launched my campaign and the moment I took my oath of office: There is nothing Minnesotans can't accomplish when we come together and face our challenges head-on. One Minnesota is who we are. When Minnetonka thrives, Mankato thrives. When Winona thrives, Warroad thrives. This past legislative session, in one of the only divided governments in the country, we proved it by passing a budget that is improving the lives of millions of Minnesotans with impactful investments in health care, education, and local communities across our state. This is what One Minnesota is all about -- rising above the politics of fear and division and getting things done for people. We have a lot of work ahead of us. But if you believe, as I do, that we can lead the country on education and health care, and provide an unparalleled quality of life for every Minnesotan in every zip code, I'm asking for your help. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********** ******** ******** ******** ******** Thank you for everything. I'm grateful, Tim Walz | ******** | | Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor

| | | Friend, Mike received an endorsement from someone whose judgment people have watched and trusted for almost 25 years: **Judge Judy Sheindlin is endorsing Mike Bloomberg for president!** She has purposefully stayed away from politics for over 50 years, and has never before endorsed a candidate for president. Our advertising budget is slightly behind where it needs to be right now, so on Sunday we launched our 2020 Iowa Ad Fund campaign to help spread our message of big, structural change.

Our goal is to raise $500,000 by **tonight** so that we can execute our complete advertising plan ahead the Iowa caucuses. If we don't hit this goal, though, we risk having to scale back our advertising efforts during the most critical period of this election.

**[You have the power to make sure we can connect with undecided voters and inspire them to caucus for Elizabeth. Can you please chip in $2 or anything you can to our Iowa Ad Fund?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b929/45c30650/1e9ad8abc/66fcdfb7/2235045908/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItZiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1OMTBGX0ZORF9HT0xfV18yMDIwMDEwN19WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-f?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN10F_FND_GOL_W_20200107_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
This is a close race, and the Iowa caucuses are the first electoral contest of this primary.

Every day between now and February 3 is a new opportunity to connect with an undecided voter and inspire them to join our movement for big, structural change.

For every person who sees a video of Elizabeth explaining the Ultra-Millionaire Tax, or hears an ad about why Elizabeth is in this fight, and then feels inspired to caucus for her, it will be thanks to grassroots supporters like you who chipped in today and made it possible.

**But if we don 't meet this goal and have to pull back our efforts, we risk not connecting with that person.**

**[If we can get our message out to as many people as possible before caucusing begins, we can win. But it starts with hitting this important goal before Tuesday. Can you please pitch in to the Iowa Ad Fund right now?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b929/45c30650/1e9ad8abc/66fcdfb7/2235045908/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItZiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1OMTBGX0ZORF9HT0xfV18yMDIwMDEwN19WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-f?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN10F_FND_GOL_W_20200107_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for all that you do,

Team Warren

| Team -

It's early, so we'll keep this short.

We're over half way to reaching the $700,000 we need to stay competitive in New Hampshire before next Thursday.

[We don't have much time left, and we can't afford to lose any momentum.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba86c/134673f2/8cfe932/699761aa/2896683847/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_010720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Polls show that up to 67% of New Hampshire voters are undecided, and if we can't reach our $700,000 goal, [we won't have the resources to reach out to them!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba86c/134673f2/8cfe932/699761aa/2896683847/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_010720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: New USA Today poll: Trump winning in key swing states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | "WASHINGTON - President Donald Trump would beat every Democratic candidate in the swing states of Virginia and Florida except for former Vice President Joe Biden, according to a pair of polls from Mason-Dixon Polling & Strategy. "In a hypothetical matchup, Biden narrowly edges Trump in Florida by 2 percentage points, 47%-45%. Trump leads Sen. Elizabeth Warren of Massachusetts, 51%-42%; Sen. Bernie Sanders of Vermont, 49%-44%; and South Bend, Indiana, Mayor Pete Buttigieg, 49%-45%." \-- _USA Today_ This comes on top of a December poll showing Trump defeating all top Democratic candidates nationally by at least 3 points. Given the rapid shift in support toward President Trump, we need to know if your feelings toward him have changed. **Will you vote for Trump in 2020?** [**YES**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf28/6e9863e8/1780b6f2/1db045e8/653061572/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/BxpDtBMup") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf28/6e9863e8/1780b6f2/1db045e8/653061572/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/BxpDtBMup") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf28/6e9863e8/1780b6f2/1db045ee/653061572/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200107a.ND&refcode2=0LjYWJ5VSN3HL9oPjTNX")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Pompeo Crushed Them, Will You?
body:
Pompeo Out

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/pompeo-crushed-them-will-you?e=41f8e27552)
Dear Friend -

U.S. Secretary of State Mike Pompeo delivered a crushing blow to the Washington establishment’s effort to push him out the Trump administration. Pompeo made a special trip to Capitol Hill on Monday, delivering a clear message: He will steadfastly continue in his role as Secretary of State. Period.

We need more strong Kansas Republican leaders in Washington who will push back on the establishment - proven leaders with the right priorities, not more careerist politicians.

As a successful small business owner, and as a former NFL defensive end for the Kansas City Chiefs, I know how to take a hit, and have dished out more than a few of my own. I’m more than ready to tackle the DC establishment and will fight to keep both Kansas and America First.

Now is the time. Join our team today, and together we will #SacktheLeft and restore strong Republican leadership that puts our American families first. Please consider donating or adding your name to our endorsement roster today.
DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=ca91f32a9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_07_02_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-ca91f32a9c-180644441)
ADD MY NAME (https://lindstromforsenate.com/endorse-dave/?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=ca91f32a9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_07_02_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-ca91f32a9c-180644441)

Thank you again for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!

Dave

P.S. We are up against three...yes, three...career politicians in this Republican primary race. Their collective careers are marked by skyrocketing spending, debt and taxes, gross mismanagement and court ordered sanctions, abandoning Kansas agriculture, bizarre self-comparisons to Elizabeth Warren, and embracing identity politics. Sounds like a bunch of Democrats, but they claim to be Republicans. We can do better. Please join our campaign at www.lindstromforsenate.com

============================================================

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

body:
Submit your responses NOW. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0cf3c16179400ed2e350adb012d641af3ec5a3e0a9078ef8de6d42c56b8eb0a40729206e5437f5a216aae4185486e41970e26b7a6d2d8782)
---

Friend,

Can you believe it's already been three years since President Trump obliterated Crooked Hillary in the 2016 Election and was sworn in as the 45th President of the United States? Finally, we have a President who is committed to putting**AMERICA FIRST.**

You'll never hear it from the lamestream media and their Democratic Partners, but the President is WINNING BIG on behalf of every day Patriots, LIKE YOU, and his approval ratings only continue to skyrocket among the American People.

America is WINNING again like never before thanks to his America FIRST agenda. Sadly, the Left is so obsessed with HATING the President that they'll never tell you the truth.

But, President Trump has NEVER cared what the Fake News media and the Corrupt Democrats think - he only cares what YOU think. We just launched our FIRST official poll of 2020, and the President has requested we reach out to his most loyal supporters to get their input.

---
| **Your response is critical \- your answers will represent EVERY VOTER in your zip code.**
---

**[Please take the FIRST Official Approval Poll of 2020 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to tell President Trump what you think about his job performance.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0cf3c16179400ed2313f5e31aa2d39e0e3a5249214bba55670c99277bfb53627c38bca6495901a6bd62be95ba8936f4fac7f2775a2ac639a)**
**[FIRST APPROVAL POLL OF 2020](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0cf3c16179400ed253ad4a83172efd1acbec597bb763efb894ad1a768a5205abddab423f0090e8f44ba31beed8068be4b9b9f73e090948d6)** **SUPPORTER:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0cf3c16179400ed22b49341f4190adedea3b5bf38154b0780d56bcd6c1f744dd409ef8a5b80bad7d54f0c1b292086b0cef4c4b2645ee663a)
POLL ID: 6124335 - 2020
POLL RESPONSE: ****PENDING****DEADLINE:** **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT** ********************************[** How would you rate President Trump’s recent job performance?

O GREAT

O GOOD

O OKAY

O OTHER**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0cf3c16179400ed275163f08fbb666aa894230a8be8a5717d9ea1a5f52df968d562a24f94e7e9fc2642c487df8bb8bb32f90a4c33bc0b642)******************************** ********[ TAKE THE POLL NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0cf3c16179400ed2a964b26a84e92648638d8be85494d06f398f5d7cb4e2d2f579cad9588823ec978ef94d819d2b88c1ab91ed5b4b0a4d01)******** _Attention: Please take the poll by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to be sure your answers are shared: _ _**[https://action.donaldjtrump.com/first-2020-approval-poll](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0cf3c16179400ed245f401bdc79edc71f9f8f259a01f68dffa1b747a473951bae59bfe1753b1372f3cf11cc20def0a116275b094b58fa000)**_
---

The Republican Party is more united now than ever before, which is no surprise considering President Trump has accomplished more in the past three years than any other President:
* **He 's successfully taken out TWO of the world's top terrorist leaders.**
* **Two conservative judges have been appointed to the U.S. Supreme Court.**
* **187 judges have been confirmed to federal courts.**
* **The WALL at the Southern Border is being FINISHED.**
* **Over 7.1 MILLION jobs have been added under President Trump 's leadership.**
* **And federal taxes have been LOWERED for millions of Americans.**

It's no wonder the 2020 Democrats are dropping like flies. They know they have NO SHOT at defeating President Trump in November. No matter how much they lie, they'll never win.

---
| President Trump really wants to know what you think. He'll be reviewing ALL RESPONSES and we want to make sure he sees yours.

---
**[Take our FIRST Official Approval Poll of 2020 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to make sure the President sees your response.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0cf3c16179400ed27e3a93fee9d1c635fb0758dbd9c276779b06b2892e46d787819fce788b202a59c4876464f7fea70d030027dd42c4cda3)**

Thank you,

Team Trump 2020

[TAKE THE POLL NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0cf3c16179400ed29a382db955bc3c89c2542d532ad3f8d6d9ed62723c7e9ca6a3ef7f25f12b3ddcbc7c9f1364356074febabcce92e4e699)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Our kids and grandkids will pay the price.
body:
We have to cut spending now. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523877?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=217cdfdca9&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=e4179d9e7e&e=90fad69796)
---
| | Peter, I'm running for Congress because I want to keep the American dream alive for my kids and grandkids.

I was blessed to be able to start a successful pizza restaurant and grow it into a thriving business. But that kind of simple success story is threatened by a federal government that has failed to do its basic duty.

Our rampant, unrestrained spending and deficit is going to fall to our kids and grandkids to pay the price for if we don't do something NOW.

Young people won't have the luxury of taking risks and starting businesses if they're forced to pay ever higher taxes all to just service a senseless national debt.

Republicans and Democrats alike are to blame, and that's why we need to elect a CONSERVATIVE House this year and really start to roll back this unprecedented deficit.

[Will you donate just $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us get our message of fiscal conservatism out there? It's more important than ever.](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=1ece465e03&e=90fad69796)
---
| [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=0359ae0d31&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| This is a conservative district. It voted for President Trump by five points in 2016. We can flip it, I'm sure of it, but it's going to take resources that the other side is going to have in spades from the coasts.

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District.

**[Please consider donating $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 so that we can flip IA-02 and finally cut spending for the sake of our kids and grandkids. ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=61f327fac5&e=90fad69796)**

For Iowa,

Bobby Schilling

clean_body: We have to cut spending now. | | | | | | | | Peter, I'm running for Congress because I want to keep the American dream alive for my kids and grandkids. I was blessed to be able to start a successful pizza restaurant and grow it into a thriving business. But that kind of simple success story is threatened by a federal government that has failed to do its basic duty. Our rampant, unrestrained spending and deficit is going to fall to our kids and grandkids to pay the price for if we don't do something NOW. Young people won't have the luxury of taking risks and starting businesses if they're forced to pay ever higher taxes all to just service a senseless national debt. Republicans and Democrats alike are to blame, and that's why we need to elect a CONSERVATIVE House this year and really start to roll back this unprecedented deficit. | "Donate Now ›" | This is a conservative district. It voted for President Trump by five points in 2016. We can flip it, I'm sure of it, but it's going to take resources that the other side is going to have in spades from the coasts. There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. For Iowa, Bobby Schilling | "Donate Now ›" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Bobby for Iowa, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Appeasement or War? Trump Proves the Iran ‘Experts’ Wrong Again
body:
"Rather than seize Obama’s invitation to ‘get right with the world,’ the ayatollahs [[in Iran] and Soleimani stepped up their terrorism." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f2a18443c8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Appeasement or War? Trump Proves the Iran ‘Experts’ Wrong Again**

“Rather than seize Obama’s invitation to ‘get right with the world,’ the ayatollahs [in Iran] and Soleimani stepped up their terrorism. They shot down a US drone. They attacked our embassy in Iraq,” Jonathan Tobin writes in the _New York Post_.

“Trump chose to deal with reality as it is. Rather than starting a war, he merely recognized that the ayatollahs have already been waging one against Washington for years. The regime counted on Trump to follow the conventional lie that the only choices are abject appeasement or apocalyptic war.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=355080e5b9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “In a single strike, the president defended American troops and diplomats against attacks, held Iran accountable for killing a U.S. citizen in Iraq and reframed the U.S.-Iran relationship by making it clear the Iranian regime cannot act with impunity,” Sen. James Inhofe (R-OK) writes today in [_The Washington Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=782b349f92&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Wages for rank-and-file workers are rising at the quickest pace in more than a decade, even faster than for bosses . . . Average hourly earnings for production and nonsupervisory workers in the private sector were up 3.7% in November from a year earlier,” Eric Morath and Jeffrey Sparshott report in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62f8614aea&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.wsj.com/articles/rank-and-file-workers-get-bigger-raises-11577442600").
---
|
---
| “As a new year dawns in America, many of the nation’s manufacturing sectors are experiencing aggressive growth . . . The steel industry in particular offers ample evidence, with America’s steel companies investing some $13 billion in new steelmaking and mills across the nation. This isn’t what many economists predicted, however. And frustrated by the flow of such positive news, the economics profession is looking for other means to wage their war against tariffs,” writes economist Jeff Ferry in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e16766ee5&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

| Team, it's not breaking news that we aren't polling first, or second, or even third in Iowa. But we're not discouraged. Here's why: Team, it's not breaking news that we aren't polling first, or second, or even third right now in Iowa. But we're not discouraged. Here's why: **Iowa caucus-goers are only beginning to make decisions about whom to support on February 3. Iowa Democrats are known for making choices late, and historically, the caucuses change dramatically in the closing weeks. In other words, this is crunch time.** We know that only 31% of likely caucus-goers have definitely made up their minds on whom to support. And over half of them have a favorable opinion of Cory. We expect caucus-goers' favorable views of Cory will translate into more support as more Iowans make up their minds over the next few weeks. **That 's because people like Cory when they get to know him, and our TV ads help drive his core values home. We've seen that the more Cory is up on TV, the more familiar people are with his values and our campaign's message of bringing people together. So the more widespread we can get our ads, the more Iowans we can bring in to this campaign.
**[Can you help us out? If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f04/5fca0d19/7b428542/291d2b7e/73008838/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f04/5fca0d19/7b428542/291d2b7d/73008838/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f04/5fca0d19/7b428542/291d2b7c/73008838/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f04/5fca0d19/7b428542/291d2b7b/73008838/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

clean_body: | | | | Team, it's not breaking news that we aren't polling first, or second, or even third in Iowa. But we're not discouraged. Here's why: Team, it's not breaking news that we aren't polling first, or second, or even third right now in Iowa. But we're not discouraged. Here's why: Iowa caucus-goers are only beginning to make decisions about whom to support on February 3. Iowa Democrats are known for making choices late, and historically, the caucuses change dramatically in the closing weeks. In other words, this is crunch time. We know that only 31% of likely caucus-goers have definitely made up their minds on whom to support. And over half of them have a favorable opinion of Cory. We expect caucus-goers' favorable views of Cory will translate into more support as more Iowans make up their minds over the next few weeks. That 's because people like Cory when they get to know him, and our TV ads help drive his core values home. Will you chip in to help us fund them? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" It's clear that we still have time to introduce Cory to Iowans and ensure a win on caucus night. To do that, we need to keep our ads on the airwaves as folks start to make their final decisions on whom to support over the next 27 days. We've seen that the more Cory is up on TV, the more familiar people are with his values and our campaign's message of bringing people together. So the more widespread we can get our ads, the more Iowans we can bring in to this campaign. [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7a26471accac41058641c3b46baf018b&_e=crmk_-EnTF1hQuesPMroJyMHiqy0RMOWOEbQls3R1qZAU6pB2pYuBV_Me1JDt46pCBfRSprBdVrrId5aNqkttQ_O-k3uX7pSunxg8yMKh5ZPUp33z-g8PgbGCz_XJTtAT_Ct_A0ebF1WW4_y0WbbUIOc_6iE7tRIq9tDeQqeqE09eUg4jjv8kdvy0bNeD1qq5xCKOKtAu4SRdJaAL2JjNU4fS94Ckj_yISS9sRpgMlWd1bt2zN3j-X_po-P8cHCxU10dxgbzFRWboPrthVQ_vU_knL_DpWNKX6yZnmlMr2UdqGvJp2LvYOHURwgDeBE9mgBnuBM85azfBRDt_ZX2uLSJvB2WHjoNVcEPcA0o7fl4nUmELrZUne7inXmb0jP45Hi5732-AW5CK_zTKsPAXCutYkpdAiq87eMxtxPxNSjqrJNPrIE-0VOynyfMvPJk) | |

Peter, it’s hard to believe 2019 is already over. In just a few months, we’ll be going head-to-head with Anthony Brindisi to take back our seat and represent Upstate New York in Congress.

That’s why we need to hear from you on what issues matter most.

**Take our 2020 Upstate Issues Survey and let us know what we should work on in the new year!**
[ **Creating Jobs** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7a26471accac41058641c3b46baf018b&_e=crmk_-EnTF1hQuesPMroJyMHiqy0RMOWOEbQls3R1qZAU6pB2pYuBV_Me1JDt46pCBfRSprBdVrrId5aNqkttQ_O-k3uX7pSunxg8yMKh5ZPUp33z-g8PgbGCz_XJTtAT_Ct_A0ebF1WW4_y0WbbUIOc_6iE7tRIq9tDeQqeqE09eUg4jjv8kdvy0bNeD1qq5xCKOKtAu4SRdJaAL2JjNU4fS94Ckj_yISS9sRpgMlWCQOJX-dKvQ5k75z6QaU-vvWP_SScgyiyjv8W7YLGHEeOFf2ur1NlmHSld2pY1F8Mey34exmfOFqF8XQx3rLplM7ZEm2jQaCgGIEIYQnnryzsdeMQeOd8OtE-_IAroYDXHxV6OQC8-Ez0jNRMYZRgGLZHkrdXJeDzZVYgQdIsGEBUrZwmd8iV8svRqKWZjqXKjGE5SM8zYCYLZb98smBw6)
