In 2019, New York was #1 in the nation...for population decline. Ultra-liberals in Albany and Washington have raised our taxes, destroyed jobs, and ignored Upstate New York in an effort to pander to New York City liberals and out-of-state billionaires.

We can’t continue to let far-left Democrats run our state into the ground.

**Take our 2020 Upstate Issues Survey and let us know what we should work on in the new year to combat dangerous liberal policies.**
[ **Take the survey** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7a26471accac41058641c3b46baf018b&_e=crmk_-EnTF1hQuesPMroJyMHiqy0RMOWOEbQls3R1qZAU6pB2pYuBV_Me1JDt46pCBfRSprBdVrrId5aNqkttQ_O-k3uX7pSunxg8yMKh5ZPUp33z-g8PgbGCz_XJTtAT_Ct_A0ebF1WW4_y0WbbUIOc_6iE7tRIq9tDeQqeqE09eUg4jjv8kdvy0bNeD1qq5xCKOKtAu4SRdJaAL2JjNU4fS94Ckj_yISS9sRpgMlWtB6d1-JTp6TG6__MykQQSqurht71pAof7OY8ed77uHUQFP097r8Ht7rUi8QiolDAXY33tUV4zPSZGG7MKiWygXZsN1JNRfjSgT0Aq2bIsUce2ox_Kwxin5ZYyoTnew8JNE4uD3NcExxJnDXQli5kvnGvCitccbG4qfI0cbG_fONUUHuO5AJLf7cUtVrc6Mx7S7I3lro-dPvk513_AzFDm)
Claudia Tenney has a proven track record of delivering real results for hard-working New Yorkers. In Congress, she reformed the tax code to empower individuals and small businesses, drastically reduced burdensome and unnecessary regulations, and secured millions of dollars for fire departments, police departments, and municipal water systems.

Every day, Democrats in Albany and Washington are trying to undo all of her hard work. We can’t afford to let them get away with it.

**Take our survey so we can fight for issues that will have a positive impact on Upstate New York!**
[ **Take the survey** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7a26471accac41058641c3b46baf018b&_e=crmk_-EnTF1hQuesPMroJyMHiqy0RMOWOEbQls3R1qZAU6pB2pYuBV_Me1JDt46pCBfRSprBdVrrId5aNqkttQ_O-k3uX7pSunxg8yMKh5ZPUp33z-g8PgbGCz_XJTtAT_Ct_A0ebF1WW4_y0WbbUIOc_6iE7tRIq9tDeQqeqE09eUg4jjv8kdvy0bNeD1qq5xCKOKtAu4SRdJaAL2JjNU4fS94Ckj_yISS9sRpgMlW0PtmosRp1s9h_MAahw9Ql66aiMYxgbW91s0h-aO4u4pEV5JSEoTZ9CLvhuuCFBeHQSq6TZyBZIpP2wPd3ken8ZEt-KI0ZTws_HK4Izt3AsVJQT6hHCcPVWl4befoQ2xpKnzcDisSH_O7u3vO3cBQfSgsDcMiZ_ahHRYL3Iom-5F3QbeGavukGLG9jp2cTcpQIrkR80YHdZvDBzEvCeXDX)
We can’t do this without you, Peter. We need your help to plan our 2020 strategy so we can send Claudia Tenney to Congress. Take just a few seconds and let us know what we should focus on:
**[https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7a26471accac41058641c3b46baf018b&_e=crmk_-EnTF1hQuesPMroJyMHiqy0RMOWOEbQls3R1qZAU6pB2pYuBV_Me1JDt46pCBfRSprBdVrrId5aNqkttQ_O-k3uX7pSunxg8yMKh5ZPUp33z-g8PgbGCz_XJTtAT_Ct_A0ebF1WW4_y0WbbUIOc_6iE7tRIq9tDeQqeqE09eUg4jjv8kdvy0bNeD1qq5xCKOKtAu4SRdJaAL2JjNU4fS94Ckj_yISS9sRpgMlWyvCEyOo3X_9VhAhEG2Mzy-CA05xMgeMt_qUTOREx8yT3zt1YgMosVlkz14CiRpqjDYlePS-yoc1f_spDC59BdO28Mderp0gQabos4CKuKZ14mv4E1tCTDLTqOjGceYaaNSBfw9nhC42uJ-qg3PFP_o0usyW5isHchb4jTQ06CjoN_r2WpldG65dUIPax2s_liIS8__sk9YJyQP6lMGRu4)**

Thanks for your input,

Team Claudia Tenney

name: Team Rita
subject: 2020 Rita Review
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1cel4uaDlme_WRGhWgDSmG6Keq1E6wkQfwI0qMNfznE=/ixiwmGOa2Cc4zvJQkzyOlH5BpAuyjxom9t1MgS6kVok=?refcode=200107-email) _Welcome to the first installment of the Rita Review for 2020! We hope you all had a wonderful holiday season and got some rest as we prepare for a busy election year. Here 's what happened in Rita world this December:_ **Holiday Fun!** Rita loved attending Grand Mound Community's first annual Christmas tree lighting. The tree looked amazing, and it was a treat to talk with community members about their hopes and wishes for the new year. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1cel4uaDlme_WRGhWgDSmG6Keq1E6wkQfwI0qMNfznE=/ixiwmGOa2Cc4zvJQkzyOlH5BpAuyjxom9t1MgS6kVok=?refcode=200107-email) **A Hart Holiday** Rita took some much-needed time off to spend with her family over the holidays, and it was both rejuvenating and inspiring. We need to win in 2020 to ensure a better future for our children and grandchildren! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1cel4uaDlme_WRGhWgDSmG6Keq1E6wkQfwI0qMNfznE=/ixiwmGOa2Cc4zvJQkzyOlH5BpAuyjxom9t1MgS6kVok=?refcode=200107-email) **All of the Lights** Rita and Paul stopped by Clinton to visit the Symphony of Lights and the Polar Express installation from Canadian Pacific. We're so proud of Clinton and the Quad Cities for showing up in such a big way to support the community and local industry! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1cel4uaDlme_WRGhWgDSmG6Keq1E6wkQfwI0qMNfznE=/ixiwmGOa2Cc4zvJQkzyOlH5BpAuyjxom9t1MgS6kVok=?refcode=200107-email) **Responding to the 5th Circuit Ruling** Rita responded to the recent court ruling that could cripple the Affordable Care Act as we know it. You can read the full article below, but Rita knows just how important healthcare is for IA-2 families. She says, "Everywhere I go in the Second District, the number one issue that comes up is health care. This ruling puts the courts on a path that could take away protections and health care from my friends and neighbors." This is why we need to elect Rita so she can fight for our healthcare! [Read the article](https://act.myngp.com/el/1cel4uaDlme_WRGhWgDSmG6Keq1E6wkQfwI0qMNfznE=/vkaMW3e82fbQ8YCDCR_fGVv0XzpgM201raBOs2fr6fY=) **ICYMI: Biofuels** Rita also recently shared her feelings about the EPA's decision to play to Big Oil instead of listening to the needs of our farmers. The new Renewable Fuel Standard rules released for next year will allow companies like Exxon and Chevron to bend the rules and undermine cleaner, renewable biofuels. Rulings like this hurt our entire farming economy, and we need to demand that our leaders listen to rural Iowans who deserve better policy than this. [Read the article](https://act.myngp.com/el/1cel4uaDlme_WRGhWgDSmG6Keq1E6wkQfwI0qMNfznE=/jk46bmjWNDiojS8vENVeMQ7eW_VgiSoWaeHWQerNx_8=?fbclid=IwAR0eJjNL-D2iQPoyxyzyhLarz6JtC5dyfKcTUuDEfIu1jq2Q-CVwQZhG2zA) **A Very Successful 2019** Finally, we want to take a moment to thank all of you for your support and donations. You helped make 2019 a successful year for us in more ways than one -- we traveled across the district listening to folks from all walks of life, exceeded our yearly fundraising goal and made some real connections listening to every voice. Thank you so much for all your support, and we can't wait to continue this journey with all of you! __ __ | __**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/1cel4uaDlme_WRGhWgDSmG6Keq1E6wkQfwI0qMNfznE=/ixiwmGOa2Cc4zvJQkzyOlH5BpAuyjxom9t1MgS6kVok=?refcode=200107-email)**__
---
__ __
__ __
__ __
__Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---
__
__Rita Hart for Iowa
P.O. Box 333
Wheatland IA 52777 United States__
__If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/1cel4uaDlme_WRGhWgDSmG6Keq1E6wkQfwI0qMNfznE=/2uSQ0Zu9hjePAi2ry-Dvm2JhwLvqZ8D3t9F1bO6XRhY=).__

__** **__

From: Charles Booker
Date: Sun, Jan 5, 2020
Subject: It’s official: I’m running for Senate to defeat Mitch McConnell._ I just got off the stage, and it’s official, folks: **I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Kentucky to defeat Mitch McConnell.** ******[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13676181/142349963/1564576560?refcode=cb2020107-nd_b2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTFjMTk3My1hMTMxLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=byGKT0Jzn4T1SEwEC2NwlVPEJ1u3D4bZkRnVgHkIpcg=)****** This announcement is a bold statement of our faith as Kentuckians and Americans. It is a declaration that we understand that nothing will change unless we stand together and lead for it. It gives me hope to hear voices from across Kentucky, who have been ignored for so long, speak up and say they are ready to fight back. This movement is proof that your voice matters, even if you’re a young black man from one of the poorest parts of Kentucky. Growing up, my family suffered from poverty, but we were never poor in spirit. I never doubted my family or the success we were capable of, even when we had to skip meals to survive. **I never doubted Kentucky, either.** Mitch McConnell was elected to the U.S. Senate the same year I was born. Kentucky has been suffering from his corruption and greed literally my entire life. This is our chance to do the work that needs to be done. To push away the status quo and build a bold vision for all Kentuckians. This is our chance to transform our future. To make sure no one has to go without healthcare or a living wage. Before I declared my run, I vowed to never accept a dime from corporate PACs. I meant it. But that means I’m depending on folks like you to power this campaign. **_****_**[Will you chip in to make sure our movement has the resources to defeat Mitch McConnell?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13676184/142349965/1564576560?refcode=cb2020107-nd_a2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTFjMTk3My1hMTMxLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=byGKT0Jzn4T1SEwEC2NwlVPEJ1u3D4bZkRnVgHkIpcg=)**_****_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **** | ******[Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13676185/142349968/1564576560?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=cb2020107-AB-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTFjMTk3My1hMTMxLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=byGKT0Jzn4T1SEwEC2NwlVPEJ1u3D4bZkRnVgHkIpcg=)******

name: 2020 Candidate Survey (via 314 Action)
subject: We need to know how you feel about every candidate's climate plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Over the next few weeks, we'll be asking for your feedback on every Democratic presidential candidate's climate action plans. We're counting on your feedback.

Our first candidate, Vice President Joe Biden, has put forth his plan to address the climate emergency facing our country. | | **_Biden's Plan for a Clean Energy Revolution And Environmental Justice would:_**

- Achieve net-zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2050.
- Spend $1.7 trillion on clean energy over the next decade.
- Conserve 30% of America's lands and waters by 2030.
- And more...
---
[](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/biden-climate-plan?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP30NTL_200107_1_2&source=314_EM_SV_30OP30NTL_200107_1_2&refcode=314_EM_SV_30OP30NTL_200107_1_2")
---
That means that over the next several decades, the United States would move toward a 100% clean energy economy. **Now that you 've read his plan, take our one-click survey and tell us if you support Biden's Clean Energy Revolution:**
| [Yes](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/biden-climate-plan?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Yes&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP30NTL_200107_1_2&source=314_EM_SV_30OP30NTL_200107_1_2&refcode=314_EM_SV_30OP30NTL_200107_1_2")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: America needs lower prescription prices NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, It's no secret that Americans pay far too much for healthcare. Hospitals charge new moms to hold their babies, ambulance rides can cost thousands of dollars, and insulin can be more than some people's rents. It's also no secret that Republicans don't care to fix the system because they take millions from the pharmaceutical and health insurance companies profiting off of our pain. House Democrats just passed H.R. 3, which would allow Medicare and Medicaid to lower drug prices through negotiation and create price caps for prescription drugs so that Americans don't pay exorbitant prices. It's a critical first step toward helping make the system more fair, but the bill is now in the Senate, where Mitch McConnell has said he will never let it come to a vote. [**If you agree that we need lower prescription drug prices, add your name to ours and call on the Senate to pass H.R. 3!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf24/6e9863e8/178293ef/1db045f0/96266823/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/prescription-drug-prices-senate/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf24/6e9863e8/178293ef/1db045f0/96266823/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/prescription-drug-prices-senate/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

We're only a few weeks away from the Iowa caucuses, and we're putting our ads all over the airwaves to show Iowans what Elizabeth is fighting for and why they should caucus for her.

But ad buys are expensive, and other candidates outraised us in the last three months.

That's why we've launched our Iowa Ad Fund -- so that we have the resources we need to get on the air this month, and Elizabeth is counting on this team to raise $500,000 by midnight tonight to execute our full plan in the coming days and weeks.

**Our goal is within reach. Based on our average contribution, we only need 308 people from Pennsylvania to chip in to our Iowa Ad Fund before midnight to cross the finish line.**

name: URGENT FINANCE UPDATE via BennetforAmerica.com
subject: please read (don't delete)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team - We just ran the numbers, and we've got bad news: the pace of donations from Cresco has slowed to a crawl today!

With just 8 days to raise the final $283,788 of our $700,000 goal, we can't afford to fall behind or miss a single fundraising goal. [Not with so much on the line for Democrats.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba866/134673f2/8c452a7/699762ca/472567582/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_010720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

After doing the math, we found that if 31 supporters from Cresco pitch in right now, we'll be in good shape to reach this goal.

[So we're asking you directly, team: Will you be one of 31 people from Cresco we're counting on to pitch in right now? name: Sara 2020
subject: Susan Collins just announced that she is backing Mitch McConnell on the impeachment process, giving him the votes he needs to block a fair impeachment trial that includes witnesses.
body:
She's just another vote for Republicans in the Senate.

**BREAKING : Collins backs McConnell's plans on impeachment**
Friends -
Susan Collins just announced that she is backing Mitch McConnell on the impeachment process, giving him the votes he needs to block a fair impeachment trial that includes witnesses.
We're not surprised - Collins has proven again and again that she is just another reliable vote for Republicans and Trump in the Senate. It's time to replace her with someone who will stand up for what's right:
[**Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign if you want a Senator who will stand up to McConnell and demand a fair trial.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e57/4bef7a87/6ae4e78a/287f9865/2794819870/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDctZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200107-full")

name: Wendy Davis
subject: Urgently need your name on this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
Families across the country shouldn't have to begin 2020 worrying about how they'll be able to afford food.
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361afa/704929dc/16174d05/39939735/742682938/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDMtamEtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk43-ja-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/support-snap?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=davis&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-snap-survey%3Fcode%3Djtk43-ja-nd")
This has me really worried, friend. **President Trump is making cuts to SNAP food benefits that will impact nearly 700,000 working people in just a few months' time.**
When I was a young single mother, my children and I never starved, but there were times I worried about our next meal. I know what it's like to stand in line at the checkout counter and realize that I don't have enough money to pay for all the groceries my family needs. I've even made a frozen pizza stretch for four meals.
I know firsthand what it's like to work hard and struggle to make ends meet - and so, I'll say this straight from the heart: Families across the country shouldn't have to begin 2020 worrying about how they'll be able to afford food. **This can 't wait, so I'm asking you and 25,000 other supporters right now: ** **[Will you add your name to demand the Trump administration protect SNAP food benefits?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/support-snap?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=davis&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-snap-survey%3Fcode%3Djtk43-ja-nd")**
[Sign the Petition](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/support-snap?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=davis&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-snap-survey%3Fcode%3Djtk43-ja-nd")
President Trump's actions will take 6.2 billion meals off Americans' tables over the next 10 years. And, friend - that's far from the American dream I know and love.
No one should go to bed hungry because they had to skip a meal - because the food wasn't there. **So I 'm asking you right now to stand with 25,000 other people and demand action:** **[Will you add your name to demand the Trump administration protect SNAP food benefits?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/support-snap?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=davis&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-snap-survey%3Fcode%3Djtk43-ja-nd")**
[Sign the Petition](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/support-snap?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=davis&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-snap-survey%3Fcode%3Djtk43-ja-nd")
Thank you for standing up for what's right,
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361afa/704929dc/16174d05/39939737/742682938/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361afa/704929dc/16174d05/39939736/742682938/VEsO/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361afa/704929dc/16174d05/39939729/742682938/VEsP/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")

clean_body: Families across the country shouldn't have to begin 2020 worrying about how they'll be able to afford food. "" "" This has me really worried, friend. President Trump is making cuts to SNAP food benefits that will impact nearly 700,000 working people in just a few months' time. When I was a young single mother, my children and I never starved, but there were times I worried about our next meal. I know what it's like to stand in line at the checkout counter and realize that I don't have enough money to pay for all the groceries my family needs. I've even made a frozen pizza stretch for four meals. I know firsthand what it's like to work hard and struggle to make ends meet - and so, I'll say this straight from the heart: Families across the country shouldn't have to begin 2020 worrying about how they'll be able to afford food. This can 't wait, so I'm asking you and 25,000 other supporters right now: "" "" President Trump's actions will take 6.2 billion meals off Americans' tables over the next 10 years. And, friend - that's far from the American dream I know and love. No one should go to bed hungry because they had to skip a meal - because the food wasn't there. So I 'm asking you right now to stand with 25,000 other people and demand action: "" "" Thank you for standing up for what's right, Wendy If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can "".

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New WSJ Op-Ed: "How the GOP Can Win On Health Care"
body:
[ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0aa4799a7e9f41358db6ce60ebb27e05&_e=BZVxkjUkMAhDlNHmg2P0xgfY2U8drGUHM3WslwDasqpv1Y4EgmPLOO4qOx1fE2QSiukRegVRbzXixJ_YOX5vS4xu5BMB66dx3rJnqnDXTU50t8dOjnUeSCCDLLAM1uWnXBwPEB-iXkXlR6nE29DquKE5GiuAPcUK1jhdvbdEXWEp5FdJnaHYVXMr5Ns-BodnG4OqfPHg_wlvrAXcK7Lp6xM7vWLY6LY0VR28qoAC8Bkc-ohj-ncWdkIz-8s9Jc2an-3y2fEnBkbB90PN6au28A%3D%3D) I hope you had the chance to read my new article in the Wall Street Journal, where I discuss how the GOP can provide viable alternatives to the left’s radical healthcare plans. As we’ve seen in recent debates, Democratic presidential candidates are repeating one of President Obama’s worst mistakes, one that arguably cost Democrats the 2010 midterms. Rather than focusing on bringing down medical costs—which are ever on the rise—Democrats are pushing policies that primarily aim to expand coverage and shift costs to taxpayers. If Republicans don’t address voters’ frustrations, the public may be forced to choose more-radical options out of desperation. The best way to prevent a government-run health system is to offer solutions that lower prices based on competition and transparency. If you’d like to read the full article, [click here.](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0aa4799a7e9f41358db6ce60ebb27e05&_e=BZVxkjUkMAhDlNHmg2P0xm-1PQbkN-RJYo5Ax6CvWt6HRhybrRkXMoJmFrNZFcfHfRKnAGZq-7SZsloAY4AavrMGCA0bNE92hYTqnjecdAI4pyBxj5sZ8iOuJxDMhFkI6_-13Y6np-vsylnKwmDfLRWasV8AJOVw_bJ7VOeeUdIIEzAWGd7rxayfG-fSvMAgWZslKRZVr5NKQ5m1OEgIR504TmIXCimjLHs9JafMcIdsZGoj0Jd6RCKdJVIefzQAGqExUdG9bcNZ8Mrj3IAIQic1fByNdnDT70Hju5DcNZgCjPWNLKGbzArj_p1utlWe825p5wW2D0Kk37rIFqmXDe7YR-Llx82u4n2EzdZt_7o%3D) [ UNSUBSCRIBE HERE ](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=0aa4799a7e9f41358db6ce60ebb27e05&_t=b9F7wGcm4jIjtinJiPZheKLql2g_WOgND6xTF_UhUJkiW1RvrCAX7nE-b_S_R0Vm1504N8TYeEzYpQdEqvnZe078_Xph4LrucI79xGS9mI_AA6JjE-iQPHbCRRO71jtMmYh8QUfvyAE0FrwMkV8BWHq3gLO-ErmDzvBq3QTdj88%3D) Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We have to fight voter suppression to win in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23% and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. But if Democrats fail to show up to vote in 2020, Trump will win again, we'll lose our House majority, and Mitch McConnell will maintain control of the Senate. If Trump wins re-election, he'll grow increasingly unhinged. Kids in cages, the Muslim Ban, tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations, withdrawal from the Paris climate accords, calling white supremacists "very fine people," and calling his impeachment a "lynching." That all will look tame. Trump will stack the Supreme Court with more lifetime appointments, more justices like Brett Kavanaugh. Trump will gut the EPA. He'll destroy Obamacare and defund Medicare and Social Security in favor of more and more tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations. Our mission at When Democrats Turn Out is to prevent a repeat of the 2016 election by educating voters in key swing states. Our mission is to support every single key Senate battleground race and dozens of House candidates. Our mission is to beat Trump in 2020. Right now, we're falling VERY short of our fundraising goals. If we can't raise another $629 today, we'll need to significantly scale back our strategy in 2020. Peter we do not accept corporate contributions or contributions from Big Oil, Big Banks, or Big Pharma. Our work is 100% funded by thousands of grassroots supporters across the country. Our work is funded by you. [**If you care about stopping Trump, electing a Democrat to the White House in 2020, and removing Mitch McConnell from power, then please, we 're asking you to please donate $5 or more immediately to support our work turning out voters, stopping GOP voter suppression, taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell, and getting Trump out of the White House. subject: Murderers, Bank Robbers, and Drug Dealers Released into our Communities for New Year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

This new year brings more than fresh starts and resolutions. Thanks to New York City Democrats, now, murderers, bank robbers, drug dealers, sex offenders, and burglars are being released back into our communities after their arrests.

I fought these radical reforms when they were introduced and I will continue to do so even after they have been enacted. Recently, I introduced legislation to repeal these dangerous laws, [**and I need your help so we can protect the public.**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=403e23b545&e=9f843ba602)

We’re only seven days into the new year, and the results of these disastrous new reforms are flooding in from across the state. Police and prosecutors are telling us stories about the violent offenders being released back into our communities and the crimes that those serial offenders are committing on the same day they are released!

[**Please sign my petition to show your support.**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=02c7ad37ac&e=9f843ba602)

This is the problem with the new class of New York City and D.C. Democrats. The voices of law enforcement and everyday citizens are being drowned out by the radical regressives focused on appeasing criminals.

Even Democrat sheriffs, Democrat district attorneys, and Democrat mayors are urging our state's Democrats to rethink these dangerous bail reforms.

These reforms show how far state and national Democrats have moved to appease their radically-regressive base.

[**It also shows us how important it is for us to fight back.**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=89f667d6f1&e=9f843ba602)

Thank you for your time. God Bless.

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Sign my petition: The person with the most votes should win!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c29a/6cd27893/537a1f73/1587e87b/4225672183/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | The person with the most votes should win. That should be true in every election, but especially for President of the United States. [**Will you sign my petition and help us build a nationwide movement to abolish the Electoral College?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c29a/6cd27893/537a1f73/1587e878/4225672183/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/abolish-electoral-college/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-abolish-electoral-college-email") There would be no more "swing states" and everyone's vote would count the same, no matter where you live. Democrats in red states and Republicans in blue states would no longer feel like their votes are wasted. If every vote counted, Republican candidates would come to blue states and Democratic candidates would show up in red states. Presidents thinking about re-election would want to compete for votes in the entire country. That's the way it should be. In 2000 and 2016, America elected presidents who lost the popular vote. It should never happen again. [**Let's build a movement to abolish the Electoral College.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c29a/6cd27893/537a1f73/1587e878/4225672183/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/abolish-electoral-college/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-abolish-electoral-college-email") _Jeff_ [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c29a/6cd27893/537a1f73/1587e878/4225672183/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/abolish-electoral-college/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-abolish-electoral-college-email") |

We need your help in these final hours. We only need 4,052 more grassroots donations before midnight to hit our goal of $500,000 -- can you be one of them?

name: James Mackler
subject: Marsha Blackburn wants to overturn Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
This is outrageous.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1ee/18d6a294/4cdcfaac/26d6355e/1932526452/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | This is outrageous: 39 Republican senators called on the Supreme Court to revisit and overturn _Roe v. Wade_ \-- including Tennessee Sen. Marsha Blackburn. [_**Add your name today and show your support for reproductive freedom. ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1ee/18d6a294/4cdcfaac/26d6355f/1932526452/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200107") _Roe v. Wade_ has ensured foundational reproductive rights for more than 40 years, but Republicans are relentlessly chipping away at those rights with some of the most restrictive anti-choice laws we've seen in decades. It's a coordinated attack designed to force a Supreme Court decision on _Roe_ \-- the kind Blackburn and 38 other Republican Senators are asking for now -- and ultimately overturn this important tenet of our Constitution. **Blackburn doesn 't think women are capable of making their own health care decisions, and neither does my opponent. He told reporters that he supports the same kind of anti-choice legislation that's made its way through our country in Tennessee.** We can't afford more anti-choice leaders who think they should make women's health care decisions for them. [_**Add your name and join me in standing up for _Roe v. Wade_ and reproductive rights. ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1ee/18d6a294/4cdcfaac/26d6355f/1932526452/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200107") Thank you, James
---

Peter -- It's clear that MJ is the best candidate to take on Senator Cornyn -- **[but she needs your help to do it!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907a2/7f51f7bc/4ad309ee/4ef023e0/1262238671/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200108.3nd__724__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

MJ knows how to win a hard fight. She's already traveled more than 11,000 miles across Texas and proven herself to more than 25,000 donors who have pitched in to support her, all while taking $0 from corporate PACs.
**[Donate now to help MJ keep up the fight>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907a2/7f51f7bc/4ad309ee/4ef023e0/1262238671/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200108.3nd__724__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
Here's what else they've been saying since MJ launched this campaign:
* _The Washington Post_ ranked Texas' Senate seat as one of the top 10 most likely to flip.
* _Politico_ reported that Cornyn and his allies are bracing for a "2020 drubbing."
* _The Dallas Morning News_ confirmed that this will be another "blockbuster Senate race."
* _The Hill_ wrote that Sen. Cornyn is facing his "toughest race yet."

Senator Cornyn's "toughest race" is our biggest opportunity, but we can't build the campaign we need to WIN in Texas without your help! **Donate now to make the headlines come true and send Sen. Cornyn home!**

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Michelle Williams
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
After winning an award at the Golden Globes, actress Michelle Williams used her acceptance speech to make a powerful statement about women's reproductive freedom.
She shared that she has tried her best to live a life of her own making, and that she "wouldn't have been able to do this without employing a woman's right to choose."
Williams then concluded her speech with a call to action, telling women across the country "it's time to vote" and elect more women who will stand up for everyone's right to make their own choices about their own bodies.
**[Team, Michelle Williams is absolutely right. That's why I am fighting as hard as I can to elect more Democratic women and candidates who support a woman's right to choose. Pitch in $5 now to join me in the fight.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200106-womens-rights?refcode=em200107i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
From re-electing Dr. Kim Schrier here in Washington state and Jeanne Shaheen in New Hampshire, to electing MJ Hegar in Texas to the U.S. Senate, we have our work cut out for us in 2020 with an incredible slate of candidates who will stand and fight for women's reproductive rights and the ability to make their own decisions about their bodies and their lives.
Our fundamental rights are under attack -- and the best way we can defend them is at the ballot box. But if we're going to win these critical fights in November, we all need to do our part.
[**Contribute $5 now to stand with me in the critically important fight to elect Democratic women and pro-choice champions up and down the ballot in November.**](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200106-womens-rights?refcode=em200107i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Patty

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200106-womens-rights?refcode=em200107i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693572/22080b68/7ba4716a/4602ff9e/2657489325/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693572/22080b68/7ba4716a/4602ff9d/2657489325/VEsD/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").
